page.content: In FY2023, Digital Realty Trust reported significant metrics regarding data center lease demand, with TotalDemand classified by LeaseType and Region. For Colocation, the DemandRating is High with a LeaseAmount of $200M; Renewals have a Moderate DemandRating at $150M; NewLeases show a High DemandRating with a LeaseAmount of $250M; Expansion is rated Low with a LeaseAmount of $50M; and TotalLeases have a High DemandRating totaling $650M.

lines.text: In FY2023, Digital Realty Trust reported significant metrics regarding data center lease demand, with TotalDemand classified
by LeaseType and Region. For Colocation, the DemandRating is High with a LeaseAmount of $200M; Renewals have a
Moderate DemandRating at $150M; NewLeases show a High DemandRating with a LeaseAmount of $250M; Expansion is
rated Low with a LeaseAmount of $50M; and TotalLeases have a High DemandRating totaling $650M.

page.content: The Q12023 growth rate stands at 60%.

lines.text: The Q12023 growth rate stands at 60%.

page.content: Concurrently, occupancy metrics across PropertyType indicate that DataCenters have an occupancy rate of 95.3%, a P/ERatio of 18.5, and a CurrentRatio of 1.2, with a 4.0% growth rate and 75% profitability; Office properties maintain an occupancy rate of 88.7%, P/ERatio of 15.2, and CurrentRatio of 1.1, achieving a growth rate of 3.5% and 70% profitability; Retail properties reflect an occupancy of 82.5%, P/ERatio of 14.0, CurrentRatio of 0.9, with a growth rate of 2.8% and 65% profitability; Industrial properties show an occupancy rate of 92.8%, P/ERatio of 16.7, and CurrentRatio of 1.3, yielding a growth rate of 3.2% and 72% profitability; Hospitality properties exhibit a 75.4% occupancy, P/ERatio of 12.5, CurrentRatio of 0.8, with a growth rate of 2.5% and 60% profitability; Mixed-Use properties report an occupancy of 85.2%, P/ERatio of 13.8, CurrentRatio of 1.0, with a growth rate of 3.0% and 68% profitability.

lines.text: Concurrently, occupancy metrics across PropertyType indicate that DataCenters have an occupancy rate of 95.3%, a P/ERatio
of 18.5, and a CurrentRatio of 1.2, with a 4.0% growth rate and 75% profitability; Office properties maintain an occupancy rate
of 88.7%, P/ERatio of 15.2, and CurrentRatio of 1.1, achieving a growth rate of 3.5% and 70% profitability; Retail properties
reflect an occupancy of 82.5%, P/ERatio of 14.0, CurrentRatio of 0.9, with a growth rate of 2.8% and 65% profitability;
Industrial properties show an occupancy rate of 92.8%, P/ERatio of 16.7, and CurrentRatio of 1.3, yielding a growth rate of
3.2% and 72% profitability; Hospitality properties exhibit a 75.4% occupancy, P/ERatio of 12.5, CurrentRatio of 0.8, with a
growth rate of 2.5% and 60% profitability; Mixed-Use properties report an occupancy of 85.2%, P/ERatio of 13.8, CurrentRatio
of 1.0, with a growth rate of 3.0% and 68% profitability.
